creator: lists@yamagi.org
text:
The cause of the "high load on FreeBSD"-problem is the method
thread_base::interrupt () in src/torrent/utils/thread_base.cc of
net-p2p/libtorrent. It's easy to fix, a pull request has been send
upstream: https://github.com/rakshasa/libtorrent/pull/21

I'll submit a new bug report for libtorrent, requesting the addition of
this fix to net-p2p/libtorrent.

-- 
Homepage:  www.yamagi.org
XMPP:      yamagi@yamagi.org
GnuPG/GPG: 0xEFBCCBCB
